title: lepidagathis chariensis
intro: Lepidagathis chariensis, a shrub-like plant native to Madagascar, belongs to the family Acanthaceae and is commonly known as the 'Madagascar borage'. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Lepidagathis chariensis has been associated with several health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. The plant's leaves can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
